title: What Makes a Data Pipeline Worth Monitoring?
author: PipelineOps Weekly
summary_p1: Use this file for hand-written pieces from you and guest contributors. Each item can be a short essay, an implementation note, a design critique, or a field report from operating data and AI systems in production.
summary_p2: Suggested angle for the first issue: define the newsletter's core thesis around data reliability, AI-assisted operations, and anomaly detection. Explain which pipeline failures deserve ML, which deserve deterministic checks, and where human review still belongs.
